---
title: "Tribute to Griffin Park"
author: "Robert W. Walker"
date: "2019-10-23"
categories: [Essex, category2]
image: "preview.png"
description: "A tribute to Griffin Park.  I had the opportunity to pub crawl all four pubs before kickoff.  Brentford's last season there."
---

## Ode to Griffin Park

Griffin Park's famous four corners make it the only football ground in England with four pubs on the four corners surrounding the ground.

Here's a link to the [curated twitter thread](https://threadreaderapp.com/thread/1162664441009360896.html).
